reviews.comment:
Siempre limpios y ordenado ,los baños  cuidados,solo que a veces la gente los arruina.El bufet,muy arreglado y prolijo ,todas las dependencias de ACA siempre estuvieron y estan bien .Aparte para los viajes largos,siempre busco parar allí.Ser socio de ACA tiene sus beneficios.

(Translated by Google)
Always clean and tidy, the bathrooms are well-maintained, although sometimes people damage them. The buffet is very neat and tidy; all the ACA facilities have always been and still are in good condition. Besides, for long trips, I always try to stop there. Being an ACA member has its benefits.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3dnBXQldREAE
